title: Token-budget context compiler
goal: Build a deterministic context compiler that selects the best bounded evidence for a task and token budget using resolved search, graph/symbol/relation signals, profile rules and citation coverage.

acceptance.assertion: The compiler accepts a task/profile and token budget and emits an ordered selected-context plan.
Selection reasons, omitted candidates and freshness/availability gaps are visible.
Selected context carries citations/range refs suitable for answer compliance.
Fallback to canonical source and required reading remains available when graph/symbol/retrieval signals are missing.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #918: RepoBrief now has a deterministic read-only context compiler that selects bounded context for a task and token budget from resolved evidence, python_symbol_index_json, relation_cards_jsonl and required-reading roles, with selected/omitted context, gaps, signals, fallback context and selection trace.
validation: Lenskit PR #918 GitHub CI passed: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, reusable fixture validation, contract static-pin/deletion policy, repo-root, templates, validate-merge-meta and webui-js-tests.
Local before merge: 222 focused RepoBrief/token-budget/symbol/relation/source-citation/access/profile/preflight/latest-complete tests passed.
Local before merge: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Local before merge: planning-registration ratchet reported no new drift.
Local before merge: doc-freshness inspect PASS.
Local before merge: git diff --check origin/main...HEAD passed.

Manual CLI smoke: generated a tiny RepoBrief snapshot, ran repobrief context compile, selected resolved evidence and symbol context, reported relation_cards_jsonl as a missing signal gap, fallback_context.available=true and writes=[].
Post-merge on origin/main 567929382c90db8bf46986cd1da8eaecde611b8b: same 222 tests passed, targeted ruff passed, planning-registration no new drift, doc-freshness PASS and diff-check pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t004-budget: repobrief.context_compiler accepts task, task_profile, optional query, signal_k, context_budget_tokens and bytes_per_token and emits an ordered selected_context plan.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t004-selection-trace: Output includes selection_trace, selected_context, omitted_context, gaps and signals for freshness, availability, resolved evidence, python symbol index, relation cards and required reading.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t004-citations: Selected context carries source ranges, citation/range refs and relation evidence where available for answer-compliance workflows.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t004-fallback: Fallback context exposes canonical/front-door required-reading roles when retrieval, graph, symbol or relation signals are missing or degraded.
